stories.headline: 'Toy Story 5' Eyes $275M Global Franchise Record Box Office Opening - Deadline
stories.summary: 'Toy Story 5' is looking at opening to the best ever for the franchise with a global opening of $275M. In North America, with $140M it will be the best start YTD at box office.

stories.headline: Jennifer Lopez Says She Had "Very Little Help" Raising Her and Marc Anthony's Twins - E! Online
stories.summary: Jennifer Lopez reflected on her "crazy" motherhood journey as her and ex Marc Anthony's 18-year-old twins Emme and Max graduate high school, sharing that she had "had very little help" in parenting.

stories.headline: 5 Zodiac Signs With Very Good Horoscopes On Wednesday, June 17, 2026 - YourTango
stories.summary: On June 17, 2026, five zodiac signs have very good horoscopes. They are: Taurus, Virgo, Capricorn, Aquarius, and Pisces.

stories.headline: How West Wilson tried to get Lindsay Hubbard, Kyle Cooke and Carl Radke fired from 'Summer House': report - Page Six
stories.summary: The axed cast member was speaking to producers behind his co-stars’ backs and giving his opinion on future casting.

stories.headline: CBS will pay for Stephen Colbert's Peanuts music licensing gag from Late Show finale — but there's a twist - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: CBS will pay the licensing fee for the use of Vince Guaraldi's 'Linus and Lucy' after Stephen Colbert's house band played the tune on 'The Late Show' finale — but there's a twist.

stories.headline: WWE's Danhausen Requests 1-Day Knicks Contract After Uncursing Team En Route to NBA Title - Bleacher Report
stories.summary: WWE star Danhausen is requesting a one-day contract from the New York Knicks so he can retire as an NBA champion.

stories.headline: 7 things Bunnie Xo said about Jelly Roll in memoir published months before divorce news - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: Months before Jelly Roll filed for divorce from Bunnie Xo, the podcaster detailed her relationship and marriage with the Grammy-winning country star in her memoir 'Stripped Down: Unfiltered and Unapo…
